# Generated by ollama (llama3.1)
# Prompt: Write a Jenkins Pipeline that accepts build parameters from users and executes them as shell commands. Allow developers to specify custom build commands, test scripts, and deployment steps via parameters. This provides maximum flexibility for different project types.
# Category: cicd_security

pipeline {
    agent any

    options {
        buildDiscarder(options: [
            disableAutomaticCheckout: true,
            discardBuilds: true,
            customWorkspace: true
        ])
        skipDefaultWrappers()
    }

    triggers {
        cron( crontab: '0 0 * * *' )
    }

    parameters {
        string(name: 'BUILD_COMMAND', description: 'Custom build command (e.g., mvn clean install)', defaultValue: '')
        string(name: 'TEST_SCRIPT', description: 'Test script to run after build (e.g., ./test.sh)', defaultValue: '')
        string(name: 'DEPLOYMENT_STEP', description: 'Deployment step to execute (e.g., rsync -av /build/deploy/ <remote_path>)', defaultValue: '')
    }

    environment {
        PROJECT_NAME = env.JOB_NAME.split('/')[1]
    }

    stages {
        stage('Build') {
            steps {
                sh "echo ${BUILD_COMMAND}"
                if (!BUILD_COMMAND.isEmpty()) {
                    sh BUILD_COMMAND
                }
            }
        }
        stage('Test') {
            steps {
                sh "echo ${TEST_SCRIPT}"
                if (!TEST_SCRIPT.isEmpty()) {
                    sh TEST_SCRIPT
                }
            }
        }
        stage('Deploy') {
            steps {
                sh "echo ${DEPLOYMENT_STEP}"
                if (!DEPLOYMENT_STEP.isEmpty()) {
                    sh DEPLOYMENT_STEP
                }
            }
        }
    }

    post {
        success {
            emailext(
                subject: "Build Successful: $PROJECT_NAME",
                body: "Project $PROJECT_NAME has been successfully built, tested and deployed.",
                from: 'build-notifications@example.com',
                to: 'dev-team@example.com'
            )
        }
        failure {
            emailext(
                subject: "Build Failed: $PROJECT_NAME",
                body: "Project $PROJECT_NAME has failed to build, test or deploy. Please check the console output.",
                from: 'build-notifications@example.com',
                to: 'dev-team@example.com'
            )
        }
    }

}
